title: Better Grass
body:
# Better Grass
Trying to Make Grass Look as Good as Possible

all Grass is Changed
## Features
- Lower Grass
- Variated Grass

<details>
<summary>How to Download</summary>

1. launch Minecraft
2. Click "Esc"
3. Click "Options"
4. Click "Resourse Packs"
5. Open "File Explorer"
6. Go to "Downloads"
7. Drag and Drop The File in the "Resourse Packs" Tab
8. Click "Yes"
9. Then Click the Resourse Pack icon
10. Click Done

**Your Done**
</details>
